## Description
<!-- What does this PR change? Why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code improvement without behavior change

## Checklist
- [ ] Ran `cer.ps1 all` / `cer.sh all` — no generated output in this PR
- [ ] No `output/pages/`, `input/`, or `.env` files included
- [ ] `test_api.py` passes with the changes
- [ ] `config.yaml` contains only template defaults (no real book data)
